home.valueAcquisitionDesc:
اكتسب اللغة الكورية بشكل طبيعي من خلال التعبيرات
التي يستخدمها الكوريون الأصليون بالفعل.
home.valueEfficiencyDesc:
حقق نتائج اختبار TOPIK و EPS-TOPIK في ثلث الوقت فقط
مقارنة بالتعليم التقليدي.
home.valueUnderstandingDesc:
نوفر الشرح باللغتين الإنجليزية ولغتك
لمساعدتك على فهم اللغة الكورية.
home.textbookDesc: تعلم اللغة الكورية بشكل منهجي من خلال الكتب الدراسية المتوفرة بـ 34 لغة.
home.ebookDesc: اقرأ الكتب المدرسية فوراً عبر متصفح الويب الخاص بك بعد الشراء.
home.videoDesc: تعلم إيقاع ونبرة اللغة الكورية من خلال فيديوهات لمتحدثين أصليين.
home.studyDesc: عزز ما تعلمته من خلال أنواع مختلفة من الأسئلة.
home.ctaSectionDescription: سجل مجاناً وابدأ رحلتك في تعلم اللغة الكورية.

about.heroDescription: اللغة الكورية هي نقطة الانطلاق في رحلتك لتحقيق أحلامك.
about.missionDescription1:
هناك طرق عديدة لتعلم اللغة الكورية.
تساعدك Amazing Korean على تعلم الكورية بشكل عملي وفعال.
about.missionDescription2:
لست بحاجة لتعلم كل قاعدة نحوية وتعبير.
لنبدأ بأكثر 500 جملة أساسية استخداماً.
about.missionDescription3:
بوجود 500 جملة أساسية في لغتك،
ستصبح اختبارات TOPIK و EPS-TOPIK سهلة المنال ومقدوراً عليها.
about.missionDescription4: Amazing Korean هي بداية رحلتك لتعلم اللغة الكورية.
about.valueDescription: 3 أساليب تميزنا عن طرق تعليم اللغة الكورية التقليدية
about.valueAcquisitionDesc: اللغة الكورية ليست صعبة. فبإتقان القواعد الأساسية وبنية الجمل، يمكنك استخدام اللغة الكورية بكل سهولة. تتخطى Amazing Korean مجرد حدود التعلم لتساعدك على اكتساب اللغة الكورية، بدءاً من 500 جملة أساسية.
about.valueEfficiencyDesc: يركز تعليم اللغة الكورية التقليدي على مجرد تعلم اللغة. بينما تهدف Amazing Korean إلى مساعدتك في اجتياز اختبارات TOPIK و EPS-TOPIK. نحن نختصر لك الطريق عبر مسار مُحسّن، وبعيداً عن مجرد تحقيق النتائج، تساعدك Amazing Korean على الوصول إلى الطلاقة الحقيقية.
about.valueUnderstandingDesc: افهم الكورية بلغتك، ثم تعلم التحدث بها.
about.stat1Desc: تعلم الكورية بلغتكم من خلال كتب دراسية مخصصة لكل لغة.
about.stat2Desc: تعلم أساسيات اللغة الكورية القائم على القواعد الأساسية (الأزمنة، والأدوات) وبنية الجملة (المسند، والظروف).

study.listDescription: طوّر مهاراتك في اللغة الكورية بمنهجية من خلال تمارين دراسية مخصصة لكل برنامج. نوفر لك محتوى تعليمياً متنوعاً، بدءاً من النطق وصولاً إلى اختبار TOPIK.
study.emptyDescription: لا توجد أسئلة دراسية للبرنامج المحدد بعد.
study.emptyDetailDescription: لم يتم تسجيل أي أسئلة لهذه الدراسة بعد.
study.voiceNotice: يرجى كتابة إجابتك بدلاً من الإدخال الصوتي.
study.completionDescription: شكراً لك على حل جميع الأسئلة.
study.notFoundDescription: هذا السؤال غير موجود أو تم حذفه.

writing.landingDescription: تمرن على الكتابة باللغة الكورية عبر ثلاثة مستويات من الصعوبة. تدرج من الحروف (جيمو) إلى المقاطع والكلمات والجمل والفقرات.
writing.freePracticeLoadError: فشل تحميل محتوى التدريب. يرجى المحاولة مرة أخرى.

beginner.title: مبتدئ
beginner.description: التركيز على الحروف (Jamo) والمقاطع الصوتية. تظل لوحة المفاتيح ظاهرة مع إبراز المفتاح التالي.

intermediate.title: متوسط
intermediate.description: الكلمات والجمل. يمكن تبديل ظهور لوحة المفاتيح مع الحصول على ملاحظات فورية محدودة.

advanced.title: متقدم
advanced.description: جمل وفقرات. تكون لوحة المفاتيح مخفية بشكل افتراضي؛ ويتم قياس السرعة والدقة.

stats.pageDescription: راجع الدقة والسرعة وأضعف الحروف في سجل كتابة الهانغول الخاص بك.
stats.weakSubtitle: مرتبة حسب عدد مرات الخطأ في كتابة كل حرف. ركز عليها في جلستك القادمة.
stats.noWeakData: لا توجد بيانات عن الأحرف الضعيفة بعد. عمل رائع!
stats.emptyTitle: لم يتم تسجيل أي جلسات بعد

lesson.listDescription: تعلم اللغة الكورية خطوة بخطوة من خلال دروس منظمة بشكل منهجي. نحن نقدم دروساً متكاملة تشمل مقاطع فيديو، وتمارين، وواجبات.

video.listDescription: تعلم بشكل طبيعي من خلال فيديوهات كورية حول مواضيع متنوعة. شاهد واستمع إلى النطق والتعبيرات الأصلية لتطوير مهاراتك.

terms.title: Terms of Service
terms.intro: These Terms of Service govern your use of the Amazing Korean service (operated by HIM Co., Ltd.). By using the service, you agree to these terms.
terms.s1Content: These terms establish the basic conditions for using the online Korean learning service ("Service") provided by Amazing Korean, operated by HIM Co., Ltd. ("Company").
terms.s2Content:
Registration is completed when the user agrees to these terms, provides required information, and the Company approves the registration.
Members are responsible for maintaining the security of their account information and may not transfer or share their account with third parties.
terms.s3Content:
The Service is provided during hours determined by the Company and may be temporarily suspended for scheduled maintenance.
Members shall use the Service solely for learning purposes. Copying, distributing, or transmitting content for commercial purposes is prohibited.
terms.s4Content:
Paid services are provided on a subscription basis and are automatically renewed according to the billing cycle selected by the member.
Payments are processed through Paddle, and applicable taxes and fees are subject to Paddle's policies.
terms.s5Content:
All content included in the Service (videos, text, images, audio, etc.) is the intellectual property of the Company.
Members may use content only for personal learning purposes. Unauthorized copying, distribution, or transmission may be subject to legal penalties.
terms.s6Content:
The Company is not responsible for service interruptions caused by force majeure events such as natural disasters or system failures.
The Company does not guarantee specific learning outcomes achieved through the Service.
terms.s7Content:
The Company may modify these terms as necessary, and changes will be communicated through in-service announcements.
Members who do not agree to the modified terms may discontinue use and withdraw from the service.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.intro: Amazing Korean (operated by HIM Co., Ltd.) values the personal information of service users and processes personal information safely in accordance with applicable laws.
privacy.s1Content:
At registration: Email, name, password, nickname
Optional: Date of birth, gender, country, language
Automatically collected: IP address, access logs, browser information
privacy.s2Content:
Member identification and service provision
Learning progress management and personalized content delivery
Service improvement and statistical analysis
Customer inquiry response and notice delivery
privacy.s3Content:
Personal information is promptly destroyed after the retention period specified by applicable laws upon account withdrawal.
Contract and payment records are retained for 5 years in accordance with the Electronic Commerce Act.
privacy.s4Content:
The Company does not, in principle, provide personal information to third parties.
However, minimal information may be shared with Paddle for payment processing, and information may be provided in accordance with applicable laws when required by legal requests.
privacy.s5Content:
Personal information is securely stored using AES-256-GCM encryption.
Passwords are stored using one-way hashing, ensuring that no one, including administrators, can view the original password.
SSL/TLS encryption is applied to ensure security during data transmission.
privacy.s6Content:
Users can view and modify their personal information at any time.
Users can request deletion of personal information by withdrawing their account.
For inquiries about personal information, please contact us using the information below.
privacy.s7Content: This policy may be modified in accordance with changes to applicable laws and service policies, and changes will be communicated through in-service announcements.

refund.title: Refund Policy
refund.intro: Amazing Korean is a subscription-based service processed through Paddle as our Merchant of Record. The following refund policy applies to all purchases.
refund.s1Content:
You may request a full refund within 30 days of any subscription payment, no questions asked.
This applies to your initial subscription purchase as well as renewal payments.
To request a refund, please email amazingkoreancenter@gmail.com with your account email.
Refunds are processed within 5-10 business days and returned to your original payment method.
refund.s2Content:
You can cancel your subscription at any time from your account settings.
Upon cancellation, you will retain access to the service until the end of your current billing period.
No further charges will be made after cancellation takes effect.
refund.s3Content:
If you cancel during the free trial period, no charges will be incurred.
After the free trial ends, the paid subscription begins automatically.
The 30-day money-back guarantee applies from the date of the first paid charge.
refund.s4Content:
In the case of duplicate charges, billing errors, or other issues attributable to the Company or payment system, a full refund will be provided promptly.
For any refund-related questions, please contact amazingkoreancenter@gmail.com.
refund.s5Content:
Due to the nature of digital content, the following refund policy applies to E-books.

• Pending payment: Orders can be cancelled immediately.
• After payment, before viewing: Refunds can be requested within 7 days of payment completion.
• After payment, after viewing: Once the E-book viewer has been accessed, refunds are not available.
• Paddle payments: Refunds are processed according to Paddle's refund policy.

To request a refund, please contact amazingkoreancenter@gmail.com with your purchase code.

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.intro: Here are commonly asked questions about using Amazing Korean.
faq.s1Content: Amazing Korean is an online learning platform for Korean learners worldwide. We offer various learning methods including video learning, structured problem-solving, and 1:1 lessons.
faq.s2Title: Q. Can I use it for free?
faq.s2Content: Some content is available for free. A subscription is required to access all content. You can try the service through a free trial before subscribing.
faq.s3Title: Q. What subscription plans are available?
faq.s3Content: We offer 1-month, 3-month, 6-month, and 12-month subscription plans. Longer subscriptions offer more affordable pricing.
faq.s4Content: Payments are securely processed through Paddle. We support various payment methods including credit and debit cards. Subscriptions are automatically renewed according to the selected billing cycle.
faq.s5Title: Q. How do I cancel my subscription?
faq.s5Content: You can cancel at any time through the subscription management menu on My Page. After cancellation, you can continue using the service until the end of the current billing period.
faq.s6Title: Q. What devices can I use?
faq.s6Content: You can use the service on any device with a web browser, including PCs, tablets, and smartphones. No app installation is required - just access through your web browser.
faq.s7Content: Please use the "Find ID / Reset Password" feature on the login page. You can receive password reset instructions via the email registered during sign-up.
faq.s8Title: Q. How can I get customer support?
faq.s8Content: Please contact us at amazingkoreancenter@gmail.com. We will respond within 1-2 business days.

comingSoon.title: نحن نُحضّر لكم شيئاً رائعاً
comingSoon.description:
نحن نعمل على إعداد محتوى عالي الجودة
لتوفير تجربة أفضل لتعلم اللغة الكورية.
comingSoon.videoDescription:
تعلم إيقاع ونبرة اللغة الكورية الطبيعية
من خلال فيديوهات متنوعة لمتحدثين أصليين.
comingSoon.studyDescription:
تدرب على تعبيرات متنوعة من جملة واحدة
عبر اختبارات الاختيار من متعدد والاختبارات الكتابية.
comingSoon.lessonDescription:
طوّر مهاراتك من خلال منهج منظم
يجمع بين مقاطع الفيديو والتمارين الدراسية.
comingSoon.notifyHint: سجل الآن لتصلك التنبيهات عند الإطلاق.

terms.title: Textbook Order Terms & Conditions
terms.agreeLabel: I have fully read and understood the above terms and conditions, and I agree.
terms.article1Content:
1. The publisher lawfully owns or holds legitimate rights (including licenses) to the copyrights and related intellectual property rights of this textbook (cover, body text, editorial design, etc.) and any supplementary materials (lecture PPTs, etc.) that may be provided with the textbook. The availability and scope of supplementary materials are subject to the order form or separate notice.

2. The orderer may not reproduce, publicly transmit, distribute, transfer, or create derivative works from this textbook or supplementary materials without the publisher's prior written consent.

3. However, if the orderer is a university or educational institution that has received supplementary materials with the textbook purchase, such materials may be used within the institution solely for lecture and class purposes to the extent necessary for viewing, screening, and conducting education. Even in this case, providing the supplementary material files themselves to third parties or posting, uploading, or sharing them online is prohibited.

4. Violation of paragraphs 1 and 2 may result in civil and criminal liability under applicable laws, and the violator shall compensate the publisher for damages incurred (including direct damages and costs within a reasonable scope).
terms.article2Content:
1. The supply price shall be the amount specified in the order form. If this textbook qualifies as a tax-exempt publication under relevant laws, VAT shall not be separately charged (tax-exempt). If there are taxable costs (e.g., separate services/options), they shall be separately indicated on the order form.

2. If a price change is necessary, the publisher shall provide written notice 30 days before the change date, and the new price shall apply to orders received and confirmed after the notice (not to already confirmed orders).
terms.article3Content:
1. The minimum order quantity per textbook title is 10 copies.

2. Orders below the minimum quantity are subject to separate consultation, and the publisher shall respond regarding production feasibility, additional costs, and delivery timeline.
terms.article4Content:
1. Orders are confirmed when the publisher verifies receipt of payment (hereinafter "order confirmation date"), after which the publisher initiates printing and production procedures. Before payment is received, the order is considered a simple reservation and production does not proceed.

2. Cancellation is possible after order confirmation but before printing production begins, with a full refund of the payment amount.

3. If this textbook is a custom-made product produced individually according to the orderer's order, and recognizing withdrawal of subscription would cause irreparable significant damage to the publisher, cancellation and refund after printing production begins may be limited only when the publisher has separately notified of this fact in advance and obtained the orderer's written consent (including electronic documents).

4. Exchange or refund is possible only in the following cases:
  a. Printing defects, binding defects, or other product defects
  b. Products manufactured differently from the order
  c. Damage during delivery

5. Exchange or refund requests under paragraph 4 shall be made within 7 days of product receipt in principle. However, if the content of goods differs from the display/advertisement or contract, requests may be made within 3 months from the supply date or within 30 days from the date of awareness. Return shipping costs shall be borne by the publisher.

6. Exchange and refund due to simple change of mind are not available.
terms.article5Content:
1. For orders of 100 or more copies, the publisher shall deliver directly to the designated location (one location basis), with shipping costs borne by the publisher. If split delivery to multiple locations is required, it shall be separately noted on the order form.

2. For orders under 100 copies, delivery shall be by courier, with shipping costs borne by the orderer. Additional shipping charges may apply for Jeju Island and remote areas.

3. The delivery period is within 5-7 business days from the order confirmation date (payment confirmation date). However, this may vary depending on order volume and printing schedule.

4. The orderer shall inspect the quantity and exterior condition immediately upon delivery, and provide written notice within 3 business days from receipt if any issues are found. However, defects that are difficult to discover immediately upon delivery shall be notified immediately upon discovery, and the parties shall negotiate exchange or supplementation within a reasonable scope.
terms.article6Content:
1. In the event of a dispute related to these terms, both parties shall endeavor to resolve it amicably through consultation.

2. If consultation fails, lawsuits related to this contract shall be filed with the competent court in accordance with the Civil Procedure Act and other relevant laws.
terms.closing: By signing this order form, I confirm that I have fully understood and agree to the above terms.

bookHub.title: مقدمة كتاب Amazing Korean
bookHub.subtitle: اكتشف كتب تعليم اللغة الكورية المتوفرة بـ 22 لغة
bookHub.slideDesc0:
يجعل Amazing Korean تعلم اللغة الكورية سهلاً.
اختر من بين 22 لغة لتفهم الكورية بلغتك المفضلة.
تعد Amazing Korean Basics الخطوة الأولى للاستعداد لاختبار TOPIK وEPS-TOPIK.
من النطق إلى القواعد الأساسية وتكوين الجمل، ابنِ أساسك في اللغة الكورية من خلال 500 جملة.
bookHub.slideDesc1: تدرب على الكتابة باتباع إرشادات ترتيب الخطوط مع إتقان النطق الصحيح.
bookHub.slideDesc2: يغطي القواعد الصوتية الرئيسية مثل الربط، والتشديد، والنطق المنفوخ، والأنفية.
bookHub.slideDesc3:
أتقن أزمنة اللغة الكورية والأدوات النحوية من خلال المفردات والتعبيرات الأساسية.
تعلم الأدوات الأساسية مثل 은/는، 이/가، 을/를، بالإضافة إلى أزمنة الماضي والحاضر والمستقبل.
تدرب على الاستخدام الواقعي من خلال جمل توضيحية وتمارين لكل قاعدة نحوية.
تعلم خصائص ترتيب الجملة في اللغة الكورية (فاعل-مفعول به-فعل) بطريقة طبيعية.
bookHub.slideDesc4:
500 جملة أساسية مبنية من التعبيرات الكورية الشائعة لمساعدتك على إتقان الأساسيات.
مرتبة حسب معدل التكرار ومستوى الصعوبة، لتتعلم تدريجياً من القواعد المهمة وصولاً إلى التعبيرات المعقدة.
bookHub.slideDesc5:
قواعد نحوية شائعة ومعقدة منظمة في جداول لسهولة الرجوع إليها بسرعة.
تغطي المواضيع الصعبة مثل التصريفات غير المنتظمة، والحديث الرسمي وغير الرسمي، ونهايات الربط.
تعمل كقاموس للقواعد يمكنك الرجوع إليه في أي وقت أثناء دراستك.
تعرض بشكل منهجي القواعد الأساسية التي تظهر بشكل متكرر في اختبارات اللغة الكورية.
bookHub.slideTags1: الحروف الساكنة، الحروف المتحركة، ممارسة الكتابة
